title: MikroTik EC25-EU&KNe, KNOT Embedded LTE4, EU
description: The MikroTik KNOT Embedded LTE4 is a flexible industrial IoT gateway for asset tracking, remote monitoring, and efficient automation ( GPIO ) featuring eSIM support, LTE Cat. 4 , Bluetooth and GNSS . It is equipped with (1) 1Gbit PoE-In port (1) 1Gbit 802.3af/at PoE-In port and (3) SMA female connectors for external antennas GPIO pins (digital/analog input / OD output) Support for eSIM , nano SIM and 2G/3G/4G LTE GNSS (BeiDou, Galileo, GPS, Glonass) Bluetooth beacon tracking Flexible power options via USB-C (power only) or PoE Device Power adapter 5V/0.8A Screws and wall plugs DIN rail mounting kit
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency LTE, Bluetooth, GNSS, 2G (GSM), 3G (GSM) Type of antenna Detachable Detachable antennas 3 4G/LTE bands support (1) 2100 MHz, (3) 1800 MHz, (7) 2600 MHz, (8) 900 MHz, (20) 800 MHz, (38) 2600 MHz, (40) 2300 MHz,… Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (3) SMA female LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 1 USB Yes GPS modul Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 12 .. 57V DC Power type PoE, USB (5V) PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 7 Power via connector/terminal 5V / 0,8A Physical characteristics Design DIN rail Fans No Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 70 Height [mm] 22 Depth [mm] 90 Hardware CPU ARM Cortex A7 CPU frequency [MHz] 1200 CPU cores 1 Internal storage [MB] 512 RAM [MB] 256 Software Operating system RouterOS v7 - L3
